raw: This is an e-voucher . Pass is emailed to the patron. This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium for up to 4 people. This Library pass is not an Aquarium entry ticket. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission. Advanced reservations are not available for library patrons with coupons. Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details. Review the Aquarium’s safety guidelines at neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience. -Valid only for Aquarium admission. -This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets. -Applies only to regularly priced Adult and Child tickets -Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold. -Void if altered. No cash value. -Hours of operation are subject to change.
